message:
test(proptest): add property tests for crash_persistence_gate, cross_crate_integration, runtime_slo_gates

- proptest_crash_persistence_gate.rs: 37 property tests covering serde roundtrips,
  invariant ID properties, ScenarioResult data loss logic, gate report evaluation
  (counts, empty pass, data loss→fail, conditional pass), render summary
- proptest_cross_crate_integration.rs: 40 property tests covering serde roundtrips,
  category/boundary label invariants, SuiteReport from_scenarios (counts, pass/fail,
  steps, assertions, fault injection, boundaries, categories, coverage gaps), render summary
- proptest_runtime_slo_gates.rs: 45 property tests covering serde roundtrips,
  SloComparisonOp evaluation (reflexivity, anti-symmetry, complement), alert tier ordering,
  AlertPolicy escalation (known/unknown classes, monotonicity), GateReport evaluation
  (pass/fail/conditional, counts, missing samples, budget remaining), to_slo_definitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
